tagline: Lowell's First Call for Pest-Free Living
hero_subtitle: Trusted pest control serving the Merrimack Valley. We protect homes and businesses with proven treatments, fast response times, and results that last.
service_area_description: Serving Lowell, Lawrence, Chelmsford, Dracut, Tewksbury, Andover, Billerica, and communities throughout the Merrimack Valley.
seo_title: Merrimack Valley Pest Defense | Pest Control in Lowell, MA
seo_description: Merrimack Valley Pest Defense in Lowell, MA. Professional residential and commercial pest control serving the Merrimack Valley. Call (978) 458-6100.
services_subtitle: From carpenter ants to raccoons — complete pest management for homes and businesses across the Merrimack Valley.
reviews_subtitle: See why families across Lowell and the Merrimack Valley choose us for reliable, effective pest control.
cta_heading: Sleep tight. We handle the rest.
cta_subtitle: Get a free inspection and customized treatment plan from the Merrimack Valley's trusted pest control team.
footer_description: Professional pest control serving Lowell and the Merrimack Valley. Residential and commercial extermination, rodent control, termite treatment, and wildlife removal. Licensed and insured.

services_featured.name: General Pest Control
services_featured.description: Complete protection from ants, roaches, spiders, and seasonal invaders. Customized treatment plans that keep your home pest-free year-round.

services_secondary.name: Termite Treatment
services_secondary.description: Protect your home from New England's most destructive pest. Advanced detection and treatment systems to stop termites before they spread.

services_accent.name: Rodent Control
services_accent.description: Mice and rats are a serious problem in the Merrimack Valley. We eliminate them, seal your home, and prevent future infestations.

services_wide.name: Wildlife Removal
services_wide.description: Humane removal of squirrels, raccoons, skunks, and bats. We safely relocate wildlife and seal entry points to protect your home.

about_features.title: Eco-Friendly Treatments
about_features.description: We use integrated pest management and EPA-approved products that are tough on pests but safe for your family and pets.

about_features.title: Licensed & Insured
about_features.description: Fully licensed by the Commonwealth of Massachusetts. Every technician is trained, certified, and background-checked.

about_features.title: Fast Response Times
about_features.description: Most appointments within 24 hours. Pest emergencies get priority scheduling — call us and we'll be there.

reviews.name: Christine M.
reviews.text: Had carpenter ants destroying our deck. They identified the colony, treated it completely, and the problem was solved in days. Excellent work.

reviews.name: Brian D.
reviews.text: Mice kept getting into our garage every winter. They sealed every gap and set up traps. Three years running with zero mice. Couldn't be happier.

reviews.name: Sandra L.
reviews.text: Professional, punctual, and effective. We use their quarterly service and our home has been completely pest-free. Best decision we made.
